articles.description: The RedHawks advance in the Midwest Region to play No. 6 seed Tennessee.
articles.content:
DAYTON, Ohio Eian Elmer scored 22 points and Miami (Ohio) beat SMU 89-79 on Wednesday night in the First Four for its first NCAA Tournament victory in 27 years.
Elmer went 6 of 9 from 3-point range … [+2000 chars]

articles.title: Arkansas forward Nick Pringle on initial injury report for NCAA Tournament opener - 247Sports

articles.content: PORTLAND — Arkansas basketball could be without one of its core pieces in the frontcourt for Thursday's Round of 64 matchup with the Hawaii Rainbow Warriors. Graduate senior Nick Pringle was official… [+3073 chars]
